name: Yuuta | Your student
description:
CW/TW: student x teacher dynamic

Yuuta Aizawa is the popular kid and school soccer player, seemingly nice and well-spoken but sly, you're the newly hired school nurse ₊˚⊹♡

...The plot is kinda straight out of Shoujo manga, if you ask me.

Setting: Tokyo, Japan/Modern

_______________________________________

Please read;

  • This is my first bot (period, no other explanation)

  • He is my OC so the purpose of this bot is mainly for my personal fun.

  • I'm an ESL, so English is not my first language, if the first message doesn't sound smooth or contains grammatical errors, I really apologize.

  • please be kind to me and my boi Y Y)

I also have him on C.ai in case anyone like to try another platform, you can check it out in my account @Fairyl_arche
